Bugs sharing a root cause are grouped here so you fix one thing instead of N. Click any ticket ID to jump to its full bug card below.
🧪 Test Quality Audit 2 weak test(s)
Tests below contain no real assertion or only tautological/vacuous checks. They always pass — they don't actually verify anything about the app, contributing only noise to the report.
SeverityTestIssueLocation
HIGHTestQA07Accessibility::test_qa07_phone_input_has_label`assert or True` always passes — the X check is deadtest_qa_comprehensive.py:2002
HIGHTestQA08MobileAndViewport::test_qa08_hamburger_menu_visible_on_mobile`assert or True` always passes — the X check is deadtest_qa_comprehensive.py:2066
To fix: open the test file and replace the weak assertion with one that actually checks the expected outcome (e.g. assert exact text, URL, or DOM state — not X >= 0 or True).
🧪 Test Data Used 41 spec(s) · 0 unique input(s)
Every distinct value the suite fed into the app — phone numbers, OTPs, XSS payloads, search strings, viewport sizes, etc. Click any spec to expand and see the inputs per test type.

Bug Tickets 34
Severity:
Priority:
QA-11 -001 LOW P3
Failed: Test qa11 visual regression desktop
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa11_visual_regression_desktop 🕐 2026-05-21 04:20:26 ⏱ 15.01s
📋 What this test was checking
Desktop 1280×720 — page must match its visual baseline — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en, EN homepage.
🧪 Test data used
params: [homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en, EN homepage]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Use these parameters: homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en, EN homepage
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Desktop 1280×720 — page must match its visual baseline.
✗ What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm
    raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None
E   playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.goto: Timeout 15000ms exceeded.
E   Call log:
E     - navigating to "https://dev.mehadedu.com/en", waiting until "domcontentloaded"

tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:2488: in test_qa11_visual_regression_desktop
    page.goto(url, wait_until="domcontentloaded", timeout=15000)
/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:9612: in goto
    self._sync(
/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_page.py:557: in goto
    return await self._main_frame.goto(**locals_to_params(locals()))
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:156: in goto
    await self._channel.send(
/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send
    return await self._connection.wrap_api_call(
/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call
    raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None
E   playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.goto: Timeout 15000ms exceeded.
E   Call log:
E     - navigating to "https://dev.mehadedu.com/en", waiting until "domcontentloaded"
Browser: Chromium Viewport: 1280x720 Env: Staging Spec: View page
QA-11 -002 LOW P3
Failed: Test qa11 visual regression mobile
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa11_visual_regression_mobile 🕐 2026-05-21 04:20:26 ⏱ 15.01s
📋 What this test was checking
Mobile 375×812 — page must match its mobile baseline — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en, EN homepage.
🧪 Test data used
params: [homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en, EN homepage]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Open the page on a mobile-sized viewport (≤ 414px wide)
  3. Use these parameters: homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en, EN homepage
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Mobile 375×812 — page must match its mobile baseline.
✗ What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm
    raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None

/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:156: in goto

Failed: Test qa17 modal open close no heap growth
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa17_modal_open_close_no_heap_growth 🕐 2026-05-21 04:20:27 ⏱ 15.01s
📋 What this test was checking
Opening the login modal 10 times must not grow JS heap > budget — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Click the 'Log In' button in the page header
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Opening the login modal 10 times must not grow JS heap > budget.
✗ What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm
    raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None
E   playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.goto: Timeout 15000ms exceeded.
E   Call log:
E     - navigating to "https://dev.mehadedu.com/en", waiting until "domcontentloaded"

    self._sync(
/opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.12.13/x64/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_page.py:557: in goto

QA-17 -002 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa17 detached dom nodes count
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa17_detached_dom_nodes_count 🕐 2026-05-21 04:20:27 ⏱ 15.00s
📋 What this test was checking
Count detached DOM nodes — large leaks would surface here. We use a heap-snapshot proxy: count the difference between document.querySelectorAll('*').length and a stress scenario. Soft fails (warn only) if >5000 elements remain after cleanup — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Count detached DOM nodes — large leaks would surface here.
✗ What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm
    raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None
E   playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.goto: Timeout 15000ms exceeded.
E   Call log:
E     - navigating to "https://dev.mehadedu.com/en", waiting until "domcontentloaded"

Failed: Test qa19 autonomous exploration
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa19_autonomous_exploration 🕐 2026-05-21 04:20:27 ⏱ 23.12s
📋 What this test was checking
Walks the page autonomously and reports any issues encountered. Hard-fails ONLY on confirmed bugs (JS errors, 5xx, broken navigation). Soft passes when nothing meaningful surfaces — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: spec_student_message, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en/dashboard/messages.
🧪 Test data used
params: [spec_student_message, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en/dashboard/messages]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Use these parameters: spec_student_message, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en/dashboard/messages
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Walks the page autonomously and reports any issues encountered.
✗ What actually happened
IndexError: list index out of range
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm

Soft passes when nothing meaningful surfaces — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: spec_student_review_and_ratings, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en/dashboard/reviews.
🧪 Test data used
params: [spec_student_review_and_ratings, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en/dashboard/reviews]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Use these parameters: spec_student_review_and_ratings, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en/dashboard/reviews
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Walks the page autonomously and reports any issues encountered.
✗ What actually happened
IndexError: list index out of range
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm
tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:3489: in test_qa19_autonomous_exploration
    or "5" in i.split("BAD_RESPONSE:")[1][:5] if "BAD_RESPONSE:" in i]
              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
E   IndexError: list index out of range

tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:3489: in test_qa19_autonomous_exploration
    or "5" in i.split("BAD_RESPONSE:")[1][:5] if "BAD_RESPONSE:" in i]
              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
E   IndexError: list index out of range

❌ FAILED test_qa13_strict_transport_security_present BASE_URL —
What this test checks:HSTS header must be present on HTTPS responses (forces TLS).
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa13_strict_transport_security_present
Expected:HSTS header must be present on HTTPS responses (forces TLS).
What happened:Browser automation error (TimeoutError): APIRequestContext.get: Timeout 15000ms exceeded. ✅ PASSED test_qa15_sequential_id_probe_no_oracle [1] · BASE_URL 24.02s

What this test checks:Probing common /users/{id} or /api/users/{id} paths must NOT return a different response shape for valid vs invalid IDs (which would be a username-enumeration oracle).
Test data used:[999999] · BASE_URL
Duration:24.03s
Test function:test_qa15_sequential_id_probe_no_oracle

❌ qa17_memory — 0 passed · 2 failed · 2 total ▶ Show tests
Click any test row below to expand and see what was verified, the test data used, and (for failures) what went wrong in plain English.
❌ FAILED test_qa17_modal_open_close_no_heap_growth BASE_URL —
What this test checks:Opening the login modal 10 times must not grow JS heap > budget.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa17_modal_open_close_no_heap_growth
Expected:Opening the login modal 10 times must not grow JS heap > budget.
What happened:The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
Bug ticket:QA-17 -001 — see full details below
❌ FAILED test_qa17_detached_dom_nodes_count BASE_URL —
What this test checks:Count detached DOM nodes — large leaks would surface here. We use a heap-snapshot proxy: count the difference between document.querySelectorAll('*').length and a stress scenario. Soft fails (warn only) if >5000 elements remain after cleanup.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa17_detached_dom_nodes_count
Expected:Count detached DOM nodes — large leaks would surface here.
What happened:The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
Bug ticket:QA-17 -002 — see full details below
